doctrine: Orangebox should feel alive: small lanes stay hot, specialists stay event-armed, heavy lanes wake with warrant.

lanes.why: Keeps the smallest useful brain awake for task triage and JSON packets.
Shares the sentinel model for cheap pass/rewrite/escalate/block pressure.
Keeps anti-fog pressure close to the operator instead of waiting for a manual request.
Keeps local synthesis warm for normal decisions without waking cloud models.
Build lane wakes when a real artifact or backend patch is queued.
Mirror wakes for contradiction, receipt disputes, and proof failures.
Wildcard pressure is available, but never final authority.
Large local synthesis wakes only when the smaller council cannot settle the path.
Heavy Mirror wakes for hard proof disputes, not routine questions.

decision_flow: sentinel checks request and current receipts
gremlin pressures weak or evasive paths
forge wakes when a build artifact is actually needed
mirror wakes when proof or contradiction matters
judgement synthesizes packets into the next action
heavy/cloud lanes require warrant and operator approval
